title: protorhus longifolia
intro: Protorhus longifolia, also known as the Natal mahogany, is a tree species native to South Africa, belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Protorhus longifolia include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and wound healer. Protorhus longifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its bark and roots are often used in traditional medicine.
